title: Old Poké Balls [Cobblemon]
description: Replaces the basic Poké Balls with a different model based on Sam's Poké Ball from the Fourth Movie.
body:
# Old Poké Balls
This pack adds a new model, textures, and even sounds for 
the existing 
standard Poké Balls in the [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) mod.

![here it is](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4786cb7a90f23988c0f08aa639e1702f4d3fe008.gif)

_(This is a resource pack, it does not add any new variants to the game.)_
